reviews.comment:
Mucha fila siempre. Los mejores precios de combustible de la zona. El shop bastante caro y me parece una vergüenza que no se pueda comprar cigarrillos con TC.

(Translated by Google)
Always long lines. The best fuel prices in the area. The shop is quite expensive, and I think it's a shame you can't buy cigarettes with credit cards.

reviews.comment:
Tradicional estacion de servicio.
Muchos surtidores, muchos playeros y buenos precios.
Poca simpatía al atender, más que nada para los que somos del interior y no conoces, pero todo no se puede pedir.

(Translated by Google)
Traditional gas station.
Lots of pumps, plenty of attendants, and good prices. The service isn't very friendly, especially for those of us from out of town who don't know the area, but you can't have everything.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias agustin mejoraremos la atencion observada salidos
